description: clear_history behavior as a standalone hermetic gate (codex Phase-4): send 3 self messages, confirm they persist, clear the conversation, confirm all gone. Exercises the per-scenario reset primitive directly rather than only as setup. No echo peer needed. #18: the three texts carry a per-run {{nonce}} so the per-text equals:0 assertions are robust to a cross-run survivor; the conversation-wide messageCount:0 assertion still depends on the explicit clear achieving true emptiness (self-only, no echo straggler).
